zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Peter Osborne於1440年出生在英國英格蘭艾可拉欽格頓時，他的父親Sir John Kent Osborne20歲，母親Elizabeth Essex26歲。他於1463年與Emme Bourchier在英國艾可馬爾頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1486年在英國艾可普利享年46歲，埋葬在英國艾可普利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Peter Osborne于1440年出生在英国英格兰艾可拉欽格頓时，他的父亲Sir John Kent Osborne20岁，母亲Elizabeth Essex26岁。他于1463年与Emme Bourchier在英国艾可馬爾頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1486年在英国艾可普利享年46岁，埋葬在英国艾可普利。

nameMeanings.name: Osborne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Osbern, partly from late Old English Ōsbern, an Anglicized form of Old Norse Ásbiǫrn (from áss ‘god’ + biǫrn ‘bear’), but more usually from Norman use of the cognate ancient Germanic Ōsbern. Osbern was often treated as an alternative form of Osbert. For pet forms see Hoskin and Opie . The surname has also been established in Ireland (Waterford, Tipperary) since the mid 16th century.

variants.name: Oborne
meanings: habitational name from Oborne in Dorset. The placename derives from Old English wōh ‘twisted, crooked’ + burna ‘spring, stream’.
possibly from the Middle English personal name Obern, an Anglo-Norman French form of Osbern (see Osborne ).

variants.name: Hoskin
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Osekin with prosthetic H-, a pet form of Anglo-Norman French names beginning with Os- (particularly Osbert, as well as Osbern, and Osmund) + the Flemish diminutive suffix -kin. All three personal names were current in medieval Cornwall or Devon; see Osborne , Osmond , and Opie (a pet form of Osbert). Old English Ōsbeorn, Ōsbeohrt, and Ōsmund may also have contributed in a minor way to Middle English usage; Middle English Oswald is another possible source, but the name was very rare in the late 14th century. For the excrescent initial H-, compare Herrick .

variants.name: Oborn
meanings: English (Somerset): habitational name chiefly from Oborne in Dorset, or perhaps occasionally from Howbourne Farm in Hadlow Down, Sussex, Woburn in Bedfordshire, Woburn Park in Surrey, or Wooburn in Buckinghamshire. The placenames derive from Old English wōh ‘twisted, crooked’ + burna ‘spring, stream’, except Wooburn in Buckinghamshire, which is of uncertain etymology.
English (of Norman origin): perhaps from the Middle English personal name Obern, an Anglo-Norman French form of Osbern (see Osborne ).

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Peter Osborne was born in 1440, in Latchingdon, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Kent Osborne, was 20 and his mother, Elizabeth Essex, was 26. He married Emme Bourchier in 1463, in Maldon, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1486, in Purleigh, Essex, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Purleigh, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Peter Osborne est né en 1440, à Latchingdon, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Kent Osborne, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Essex, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Emme Bourchier en 1463, à Maldon, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1486, à Purleigh, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Purleigh, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Peter Osborne 1440 in Latchingdon, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Kent Osborne 20 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Essex 26. Er hat 1463 in Maldon, Essex, England Emme Bourchier geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1486 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Purleigh, Essex, England und wurde in Purleigh, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Peter Osborne è nato il nel 1440 nel Latchingdon, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Kent Osborne, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Essex, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Emme Bourchier nel 1463, nel Maldon, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1486, nel Purleigh, Essex, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Purleigh, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Peter Osborneが1440年にイギリスイギリスエセックスラトチングドンで生まれた時，父Sir John Kent Osborneは20歳，母Elizabeth Essexは26歳であった。1463年にイギリスエセックスマルドンでEmme Bourchierと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1486年にイギリスエセックスプウルレイグで46歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスプウルレイグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Peter Osborne(이)가 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 라트친그던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Kent Osborne(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Essex(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1463년 영국 에세스 맬던에서 Emme Bourchier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1486년 영국 에세스 푸를리에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 푸를리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Peter Osborne nasceu em 1440, em Latchingdon, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Kent Osborne, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Essex, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Emme Bourchier em 1463, em Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1486, em Purleigh, Essex, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Purleigh, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Peter Osborne родился в 1440 г. в местности лачингдон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Kent Osborne было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Essex, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Emme Bourchier в 1463 г. в местности малдон, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1486 г. в местности пурлиг, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности пурлиг, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Peter Osborne nació en 1440, en Latchingdon, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Kent Osborne, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Essex, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Emme Bourchier en 1463, en Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1486, en Purleigh, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Purleigh, Essex, Inglaterra.
